Description: Console iframe mounted/opened (once per load).
How to reproduce: Open the console URL / the converse-ai tab that embeds it.

Description: Item fetch finished; carries load time.
How to reproduce: Load the console and wait for the queue to render.

Description: Loaded fine but scope has zero items.
How to reproduce: Open the console for a team/department with no action items.

Description: Opened without full scope (enterprise/team/token).
How to reproduce: Open the console URL with no enterpriseId/teamId/token (bare Vercel URL).

Description: User or host switched Sales <-> Service.
How to reproduce: Click the Service toggle top-right, then Sales.

Description: Selected an action item/group; right pane shows it.
How to reproduce: Click any customer/item row in the queue.

Description: Call/conversation drawer opened for an item.
How to reproduce: Open an item, then click Listen or Transcript.

Description: Recording actually started playing (aha moment).
How to reproduce: Open the drawer on an item with a recording; press play on the waveform.

Description: Opened the Transcript tab in the drawer.
How to reproduce: In the drawer, click the Transcript tab.

Description: Item resolved with an outcome.
How to reproduce: Open an item; click Resolve; pick an outcome; confirm.

Description: First resolve of the session (once) + time-to-value.
How to reproduce: Load fresh; resolve your first item (won't fire again until reload).

Description: Item assigned to a rep.
How to reproduce: Open an item; click Assign; pick a user.

Description: Item flagged Incorrect (optionally reclassified).
How to reproduce: Open an item; click Incorrect; pick a reason (optionally corrected intent); confirm.

Description: Switched Unresolved/Resolved/Incorrect tabs.
How to reproduce: Click the Resolved tab, then Incorrect.

Description: Changed a dropdown filter (Intent/Assignment/Channel).
How to reproduce: Change the Intent (or Assignment/Channel) dropdown.

Description: Toggled a boolean quick-chip (Repeat callers/Callbacks).
How to reproduce: Click the Repeat callers chip, then Callbacks.

Description: Cleared filters (or a change resetting 3+ at once).
How to reproduce: Apply a few filters, then click Clear.

Description: Clicked an SLA hero tile to filter the queue.
How to reproduce: Click the Past SLA / Unassigned / Repeat callers number tile at top.

Description: Changed the Group-by control.
How to reproduce: Change Group by to Intent / Assignee / None.

Description: Bulk-resolved all visible items for a customer/group.
How to reproduce: On a customer with multiple items, click Resolve all N.

Description: Restored an Incorrect item to the queue.
How to reproduce: Go to Incorrect tab; click Restore on an item.

Description: Opened the customer side drawer.
How to reproduce: Click a customer name in the queue/right pane.

Description: Ran a search (debounced ~600ms).
How to reproduce: Type a name/phone (2+ chars) in queue search; pause.

Description: Clicked a search result row.
How to reproduce: Search, then click a Customer/Intent/Action item result.

Description: Opened Browse all N conversations in the drawer.
How to reproduce: Open a drawer where the item has no direct call; click Browse all N conversations.

Description: Opened a specific call/SMS from the browse list.
How to reproduce: In the browse list, click one conversation card.

Description: Clicked a transcript line to seek the audio.
How to reproduce: In the drawer, play a call; click any transcript turn.

Description: Opened the Rules (SLA) panel.
How to reproduce: Click Rules next to the tabs.

Description: An SLA rule saved to backend (live mode).
How to reproduce: Open Rules; change an intent SLA value/unit; close the panel.

Description: Initial item fetch failed (red error screen).
How to reproduce: Open the console with a bad/expired token or unreachable env.

Description: A backend GET returned non-OK (items/completed/user-list).
How to reproduce: Bad token, or DevTools block the request to force a 4xx/5xx.

Description: Backlog paging failed after page 1 (partial list).
How to reproduce: On a large multi-page rooftop, force a mid-pagination failure (offline after page 1).

Description: End-call report couldn't load (falls back to evidence).
How to reproduce: Open a call item whose report 404s, or DevTools-block end-call-report-by-id.

Description: Report loaded but no recording URL (amber no-recording).
How to reproduce: Open a call item whose report has no stored audio.

Description: Amber banner: showing customer's latest call, not the item's own.
How to reproduce: Open a call-type item with no linked call id where the customer has other calls.

Description: Optimistic resolve/flag succeeded in view but BE write failed.
How to reproduce: Block the write endpoint; Resolve or flag an item (toast Saved in view).

Description: Assignment PATCH failed.
How to reproduce: Block the assignment endpoint; Assign an item (Could not assign).

Description: Saving an SLA rule to backend failed.
How to reproduce: Block dealer-intent-config; edit an SLA and close (SLA saved in view).

Description: A search returned no matches.
How to reproduce: Type a query that matches nothing (e.g. zzzzz); pause.

Description: Filters/search hid the whole queue while pending work exists.
How to reproduce: Apply a filter combo or search that matches nothing while items exist.
